title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click, automating both control plane and data plane management. It includes built-in auto-scaling via Karpenter, cost optimization, and support for AI workloads including inference and training at scale.
